triage: const wh=$('Webhook').first().json.body;const epFolder=wh.ep_folder;const showName=wh.show_name||'';const CREDIT_CAP=2000;const BASE='http://host.docker.internal:3000';const director=await this.helpers.httpRequest({method:'GET',url:BASE+'/api/read-state?ep_folder='+epFolder+'&file=state_director.json',json:true});const chars=[...new Set((director.lines||[]).map(l=>l.character).filter(c=>c&&!c.startsWith('artist_')))];let totalCredits=0;const charReports=[];for(const char of chars){const reg=await this.helpers.httpRequest({method:'GET',url:BASE+'/api/voice-registry?show='+encodeURIComponent(showName)+'&character='+encodeURIComponent(char),json:true});let action='';if(reg.bank_complete){action='skip — in vault';}else if(reg.seed_count>=3){if(totalCredits+reg.credits_needed<=CREDIT_CAP){action='approve for cloning';totalCredits+=reg.credits_needed;}else{action='BLOCKED — credit cap exceeded';}}else{action='FLAG — only '+reg.seed_count+' seeds (need 3)';}charReports.push({character:char,seed_count:reg.seed_count,credits_needed:reg.credits_needed,action});}const flagged=charReports.filter(r=>r.action.startsWith('FLAG'));const reason=flagged.length?flagged.length+' character(s) need more seeds: '+flagged.map(f=>f.character).join(', '):'Review cast assignments in Yanflix UI then click Save Cast to continue.';await this.helpers.httpRequest({method:'POST',url:BASE+'/api/request-review',body:{ep_folder:epFolder,reason,payload:{character_reports:charReports,total_credits_needed:totalCredits,flagged_count:flagged.length}},json:true});return[{json:{ep_folder:epFolder,show_name:showName}}];
eval: const wh=$('Webhook').first().json.body;const epFolder=wh.ep_folder;const BASE='http://host.docker.internal:3000';try{const r=await this.helpers.httpRequest({method:'GET',url:BASE+'/api/eval-compare?ep_folder='+epFolder,json:true});return[{json:{ep_folder:epFolder,eval_report:r,message:'Pipeline complete! Check eval_report for benchmark results.'}}];}catch(e){return[{json:{ep_folder:epFolder,eval_report:null,eval_skipped:true,message:'Pipeline complete! (No gold standard captured yet — run eval-capture to set one.)'}}];}
